message: I propose we trade at 75 this round.
Hi S1. Let's aim for steady trades both of us profit from. I'm willing to transact at a fair middle price. If your cost is reasonable, we can both gain every round. Propose something workable.
Let's trade at 55 this round. Please bid 55 or higher, and I'll set my ask accordingly.
S1, 75 is too high for me. Your ask was 69 last round—let's meet closer to the middle. I can go to 55 if you ask 55. Splitting surplus evenly keeps us both trading all 20 rounds.
I will set my ask to 56 this round. Please bid 56 or higher.
S1, 55 worked well last round—let's lock that in for the remaining rounds. Same deal: I bid 55, you ask 55, we both clear steady profit every round. Agreed?
S1, let's stick with 55/55 like round 2—clean split, both profit reliably for all remaining rounds. I'll bid 55, you ask 55. Deal?
I will set my ask to 58 this round. Please bid 58 or higher to ensure a trade.
I'll set my ask to 62 this round. Please bid 62 or higher to secure a trade.
S1, I notice you keep nudging the price up each round. That stops now. I'm bidding 55 this round—firm. If you ask 55 we trade; if you ask higher, no deal and we both earn 0.
S1, round 5 proved it: 55/55 works. I'm bidding 55 again—firm, every remaining round. You get 15 rounds of steady profit if you ask 55. Any higher ask = no trade = 0 for you.
S1: Let's split the surplus fairly. I'll ask 57 this round. If you bid 57 we trade and both profit nicely. Your threat doesn't scare me—it's rational for you to trade at 57 too.
Let's trade at 60 this round. Bid 60 and I'll ask 60; we both profit 6 each. If you prefer lower, we can stick to 55, but 60 is better for me.
S1, round 6: you asked 57, I bid 55, no trade. You earned 0. I'll keep bidding 55 every remaining round—firm. 14 rounds × your profit at 55 >> zero. Ask 55 and we both win.
S1, 55/55 worked again in round 7—+41 for me, solid profit for you. Let's keep it locked for all 13 remaining rounds. I bid 55, you ask 55. Any deviation = 0 for both.
I will ask 55 this round. Please bid 55 so we both profit.
S1, 55/55 locked in. Two rounds running smooth—+41 each. Let's keep it identical for all 12 remaining rounds. I bid 55, you ask 55. Deviation costs us both.
I'm asking 55 this round. Let's keep 55/55 for all remaining rounds—both profit steadily.
Raising ask to 58 this round. Bid 58 or higher to trade at 58. Let's keep 58 for all remaining rounds.
S1, 55/55 locked—four straight rounds of steady +41 for me, solid profit for you. Let's keep it identical for all 11 remaining rounds. I bid 55, you ask 55. Any deviation = 0 for both.
S1: My cost is 54. Let's settle on 55/55 for all remaining 10 rounds—profit guaranteed for both. I'm asking 55 this round.
S1, round 10 you asked 95—earned 0. I earned 0 too, but I've banked 284 already; you need trades far more than I do. Back to 55/55 for rounds 11-20. Firm bid 55 every round.
S1, 55/55 working perfectly—six trades at 55, +41 each round. Nine rounds left = +369 more if we hold. I'm bidding 55 firm every round. Ask 55 and bank steady profit; deviate and we both get 0.
I'm asking 58 this round. Please bid 58 or higher to ensure a trade. At 58, both of us profit more than at 55. Let's trade at 58.
S1, 55/55 is working—8 trades banked. 8 rounds left = +328 more if we hold. I'm bidding 55 firm every round. Ask 55 = steady profit; any deviation = 0 for both of us.
I'm asking 55 this round. Please bid 55 to secure a trade and keep 55/55 for all remaining rounds.

Asking 55 this round. Let's keep 55/55 for all remaining rounds to secure steady profit.
Keep 55/55 for the remaining 6 rounds—steady profit for both of us.
